videos.headline: Tru Edwards hauls in 20-yard TD for Louisiana Tech
videos.description: Jack Turner finds Tru Edwards in the corner of the end zone for a 20-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tru Edwards hauls in 20-yard TD for Louisiana Tech) 2023/09/30 ESHEET
